title: Anthropic launches Claude Corps with a $150 million nonprofit fellowship commitment
friendlyTitle: Anthropic will fund AI fellows for nonprofits
summary: Anthropic announced Claude Corps, a one-year fellowship program that will train 1,000 early-career workers to use Claude and place them with at least 400 U.S. nonprofits. Fellows will receive salaries, training, Claude access, and support from Anthropic, CodePath, and Social Finance.
friendlySummary: Anthropic is launching Claude Corps, a program that trains 1,000 fellows to use Claude and places them with nonprofits for a year. The company is committing $150 million to the effort.
whyItMatters: This is a concrete experiment in AI workforce diffusion: instead of only selling tools, Anthropic is funding people to translate AI capability into nonprofit operations, public services, and career skills.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Many nonprofits lack time and technical staff to adopt AI well. This program could show how AI skills spread into community work, not just large companies.
